user_query: I'm conducting a research project on the correlation between the price of Bitcoin and the performance of global stock markets. Can you provide me with the historical OHLCV data for Bitcoin and the S&P 500 index for the past 3 months?

TaskList.description: Retrieve historical OHLCV data for Bitcoin for the past 3 months.
Retrieve historical OHLCV data for the S&P 500 index for the past 3 months.
Analyze the correlation between the two datasets retrieved in steps 1 and 2.
